profile.name: Lucas Picchi
profile.title: Fullstack Engineer
profile.bio: Full-stack engineer building industrial IoT and telemetry platforms that connect embedded systems with scalable backend infrastructure. I design systems that ingest high-frequency sensor data, automate production workflows, and power real-time monitoring platforms used in manufacturing environments.

about.description: I'm an electronics engineering student and full-stack engineer focused on industrial technology. Currently Lead Developer at an industrial manufacturing company where I design production software connecting embedded hardware with modern data infrastructure.s. I focus on building reliable systems that handle large volumes of sensor data, automate production workflows, and provide actionable insights through analytics and visualization.

projects.title: Industrial Telemetry Platform
projects.description: Real-time monitoring system for industrial compressors, featuring high-frequency data ingestion and live performance visualization.

projects.title: Kanban VFD Repair shop CRM
projects.description: CRM for a repair shop, with a kanban board to handle issues, integration with legacy SMB and MAIL servers, docker-compose deployment and easy setup via a WEB GUI

bullets: Architected a real-time telemetry platform for industrial compressor systems.
Lead a team of 3 developers designing scalable backend systems and internal production tools.
Optimizing industrial data ingestion pipelines using Redis and PostgreSQL.
Designed and maintained CI/CD pipelines and containerized deployments using Docker and GitLab CI.
Developed an automated QA system for production lines
Designed and implemented backend services for industrial data processing.
Engineered responsive real-time dashboards to visualize complex industrial telemetry metrics.
Developed embedded data acquisition systems for industrial compressors.
Built CI/CD pipelines for automated testing and deployment.
Built and maintained scalable web applications using Node.js and React.
Improved database performance through advanced indexing and query optimization strategies.
Established the company's first CI/CD pipeline for automated testing and deployment.
